span.p: Most specific nail: Periungual pyogenic granulomas

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: -- Serious: Can lead to trichiasis → corneal ulceration

span.p: Prognostic: Rash SEVERITY correlates with tumor response/survival

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Management: Nail care, topical abs, vinegar soaks, TCS, silver nitrate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: High yield: Look for periungual pyogenic granulomas!
